query:
ALTER TABLE livestream_products 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS grossRevenue BIGINT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS directGmv BIGINT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS itemsSold INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customers INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `orders` INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ctr VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ctor VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productImpressions INT;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute ALTER TABLE livestream_products 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS grossRevenue BIGINT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS directGmv BIGINT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS itemsSold INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customers INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `orders` INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ctr VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ctor VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productImpressions INT;
